_comment: Registry of removed or renamed concepts the evolution engine watches for. Each entry has: id (short key), pattern (regex to search for in repo files), replaced_by (what it's called now, or null if simply removed), removed_date (ISO date), surface (which file category: docs|doctrine|tooling|members|skills). The scanner reports hits as stale mentions; --apply removes them. Add entries here when you remove or rename a concept in the repo.

entries.note: Critic seat was removed; only Brain and Doer remain
Same as triple-seat — Critic was removed
Critic is no longer a separate seat — it is now the verify-gate hook, not a model seat
Critic removed from the seat list
Replaced with explicit Claude=Brain / Hermes=Doer framing
